TTIPTAP
Get startedSign in

How it works

A single operational narrative — from scan to settlement

TIPTAP keeps guest intent, operations, and finance aligned with QR-grounded sessions and role-aware workspaces.

Choose your path

Scan QR

01

A QR code anchors context: business, branch, table/station, and optional staff host.

Start WhatsApp journey

02

Guests interact without an app: menu/services, assistance, bill requests, tips, and ratings.

Capture operational events

03

Requests become structured records: waiter calls, bill requests, assistance queues — audit-backed.

Surface signals in dashboards

04

Managers see payment health, tips sentiment, ratings, and category-native operations by scope.

Reconcile + produce statements

05

Transactions, webhooks, and reconciliation flags roll into statements for finance-ready visibility.

Key idea

TIPTAP is not “a dashboard” — it’s a role-aware operating system.

Managers operate businesses with category-native tools. Staff focus on work signals and earnings. Super Admins observe platform health.

Start onboardingSign in
